title: taraxacum exsanguineum
intro: Taraxacum exsanguineum, also known as the bloodless dandelion or Western dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum exsanguineum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum exsanguineum typically include dried roots and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, and capsules for medicinal use.
